title.rendered: Getting Started with Prowler Detections and Remediations

content.rendered: Join Prowler CEO Toni de la Fuente and Engineers Sergio Garcia and Ruben De la Torre for a hands-on look at Prowler’s detection and remediation capabilities. In this 60-minute session, you’ll discover how to identify security risks effectively, address vulnerabilities in real time, and streamline your cloud security workflow with best practices and live demos. Don’t miss this chance to enhance your Prowler expertise and strengthen your cloud defenses!
